synopsis:
Picking up from the previous novel, Luke and Ben Skywalker narrowly survive a Sith assassination attempt at Sinkhole Station. The lone survivor, Vestara Khai, flees to Dathomir to alert the Lost Tribe of Sith, deliberately leading the Skywalkers to her as Luke tracks her by a Dathomiri blood trail. On Dathomir, the Skywalkers are joined by Han and Leia Solo, their daughter Jaina, and granddaughter Allana. The group becomes entangled in the planned unification of two clans, the Force-sensitive Raining Leaves Witches and the freed male slaves of the Broken Columns, whose summit is repeatedly attacked by the Nightsisters. Luke and Ben rally both clans to repel the assaults, and the united group becomes the Bright Sun Clan.

Meanwhile, Galactic Alliance Chief of State Natasi Daala faces mounting public and military resistance to her treatment of the Jedi, with comparisons to Palpatine growing. Admiral Cha Niathal, summoned to face trial for aiding Darth Caedus, takes her own life rather than be pardoned. Imperial Moff Drikl Lecersen schemes to destabilize a possible peace between Daala and the Jedi, staging an attack on the Solos and Jagged Fel through a terrorist who is killed in the attempt.

The Sith return to abduct the surviving Nightsisters into the Lost Tribe and capture Vestara, who had been working for them all along. As Luke and Ben leave Dathomir aboard the *Jade Shadow*, they are intercepted by a fleet of Sith warships and cut their engines, bracing to be contacted.
title: Backlash
